speaker: Argo
text: "Oh, those two are..." *sigh*

speaker: Diederich
text: "Hey, Argo. You buyin' somethin' to eat too?"

speaker: Julius
text: "You've come at the right time! Here, try this!"

speaker: Julius
text: As Julius says that, he pushes something skewered towards my mouth. *

speaker: Argo
text: "Hey... Please don't suddenly put unknown objects in my mouth!"

speaker: Julius
text: "What!? You don’t know what this is!?"

speaker: Argo
text: "No! What is it?" *sigh*

speaker: Julius
text: "It's a delicacy from Harshreich, pepper grilled snake!"

speaker: Argo
text: "Oh, snake...? Don't mind if I do!"

speaker: Julius
text: "I?!?" *sigh*
“I use my hands and teeth to tear off a piece of the snake meat on the skewer he’s still holding.” *sigh*

speaker: Argo
text: "...! It's a little spicy, but it goes well with the mildness of the snake meat. Delicious!"

speaker: Julius
text: "...I didn't think you’d actually eat it without putting up a bit of a fight."

speaker: Argo
text: "Why? I used to eat snakes back in my village..."

speaker: Julius
text: "I-I see... I'd expect no less from a man like you!"

speaker: Argo
text: "It's totally normal for me, though..."

speaker: Diederich
text: "Wahaha haha! It’s never a dull moment with you!"

speaker: Julius
text: "I must stay diligent as well."

speaker: Argo
text: “It’s not that big of a deal…”

speaker: Argo
text: "Julius... Could it be you can’t eat pepper grilled snake?"

speaker: Julius
text: "Ngh……! That’s not true! I can!"

speaker: Argo
text: "Then, please. Have the rest."

speaker: Diederich
text: "Pft... Heh heh..."

speaker: Julius
text: "A-A snake or two... is no problem for me..."

speaker: Diederich
text: "Don’t force yourself, Julius."

speaker: Julius
text: "No! I would never make my underclassman eat something I would never eat myself!"
Julius bites into the snake meat. *sigh*

speaker: Julius
text: "I…"*sigh*

speaker: Argo
text: "What do you think?" *sigh*

speaker: Julius
text: "It... It's surprisingly good..."

speaker: Argo
text: "Isn't it?"

speaker: Diederich
text: "Now I gotta take a bite too!"
Professor Derich chomps down on the snake meat in Julius’s hand this time.

speaker: Diederich
text: "Hoh, you can't beat Harshreich’s flavors."

speaker: Argo
text: "Have you eaten snake before?"

speaker: Diederich
text: "Well, they’re a good way to fill your belly when you're a pirate on a small island."

speaker: Argo
text: "Interesting."

speaker: Julius
text: "Grr... I feel like such a novice right now..."

speaker: Argo
text: "Oh, come on. It’s all in your head."

speaker: Argo
text: "Um, there's something I’ve been wondering."

speaker: Diederich
text: "Hm?"

speaker: Argo
text: "Who would win in a fight, Julius or Lord Baten?"

speaker: Julius
text: "Oh? Me fighting a dragon?"

speaker: Argo
text: "It's just hypothetical. Could you beat him?"

speaker: Julius
text: "I don’t know what Mr. Baten's E.P. is."

speaker: Argo
text: "Ah, I see... Then... What do you think, Professor Derich? You know what both of their E.P.s are."

speaker: Diederich
text: "Hm... If all he has do is bring Baten to his knees, I think Julius could win."

speaker: Argo
text: "Really...?"

speaker: Julius
text: "And if it was a fight to the death?"

speaker: Diederich
text: "Baten."

speaker: Diederich
text: "Then again, who knows? When two E.P. users clash, anything could happen."

speaker: Julius
text: "I doubt I would ever make an attempt on Mr. Baten's life."

speaker: Diederich
text: "You never know, Baten might come after you."

speaker: Julius
text: "Why would he do that?"

speaker: Diederich
text: "I don’t know, you accidentally stepped on his tail?"

speaker: Julius
text: "In that case, wouldn't that be an overreaction?” *sigh*

speaker: Argo
text: "I'll have to be careful not to do that myself..." *sigh*

speaker: Argo
text: "How’s it feel to be graduating soon, Julius? Sad?”

speaker: Julius
text: "No. It's exciting!"

speaker: Argo
text: "R-Really...? If I were you, I'd miss it after living here for so long..."

speaker: Julius
text: "True, I would feel the same. But only if we had lived together for four years." *sigh*

speaker: Diederich
text: "If you wanna stay here, you could be a professor."

speaker: Argo
text: "Huh?"

speaker: Diederich
text: "I mean, it’s true, ain't it? I’m always here."

speaker: Argo
text: "I-I guess..."

speaker: Diederich
text: "You should be a professor too, Argo. That way you'll stay with me."

speaker: Argo
text: "That would be great..."

speaker: Julius
text: "Hold on. That's not how you should decide your career path."

speaker: Diederich
text: "Then what is?" *sigh*

speaker: Julius
text: "What are your strengths? How can you contribute to society? Things like that are what a knight should consider."

speaker: Argo
text: "Contribute... to society...? *sigh*"

speaker: Diederich
text: "Aw, gimme a break. You’re too serious."

speaker: Julius
text: "Isn't teaching that part of a professor’s job?"

speaker: Diederich
text: "Don’t you dare look at me like that." *sigh*

speaker: Argo
text: "Professor Derich went silent..."

speaker: Argo
text: "Time for me to head out."

speaker: Diederich
text: "Argo, let's have a snake tastin' party next time."

speaker: Argo
text: "That'd be fun, but I wonder if there’s enough kinds of snakes for that."

speaker: Diederich
text: "You should join too, Julius."

speaker: Julius
text: "It'd be nice if you at least had some normal meat..."
